hooks.command: ts=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "[$ts] PostToolUse Edit|Write on $file" >> .claude/hook-activity.log

ts=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'); file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$file" in *dags/*.py) output=$(astro dev parse 2>&1); if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then echo "[$ts] ✅ parse $file" >> .claude/hook-activity.log; jq -n --arg msg "✅ DAG parse passed: $file" '{decision: "block", reason: $msg}'; else echo "[$ts] ❌ parse $file" >> .claude/hook-activity.log; echo "$output" >> .claude/hook-activity.log; jq -n --arg msg "❌ DAG parse failed: $file\n\n$output" '{decision: "block", reason: $msg}'; fi ;; esac
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$file" in *dags/*.py) echo "✅ Auto-tested DAG: $file" >> .claude/dag-changelog.md ;; esac
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected' >&2; exit 2; fi
